Kauai.name: Kauai
Kauai.description: The Garden Isle — lush valleys, sea cliffs, and tropical rivers.

Oahu.name: Oahu
Oahu.description: The Gathering Place — urban jungle meets stunning coastline.

Maui.name: Maui
Maui.description: The Valley Isle — volcanic peaks, bamboo forests, and coral reefs.

Molokai.name: Molokai
Molokai.description: The Friendly Isle — remote sea cliffs and quiet valleys.

Lanai.name: Lanai
Lanai.description: The Pineapple Isle — dramatic rock formations and secluded bays.

Hawaii.name: Hawaii
Hawaii.description: The Big Island — active volcanoes, black sand beaches, and diverse ecosystems.

kauai_001.name: Nā Pali Glider
kauai_001.description: A swift aerial breed that soars along Kauaʻi's dramatic cliffs.
kauai_001.spawnInfo: Found on Nā Pali Coast trail heads and clifftop lookouts.

primaryAbility.name: Cliff Draft
primaryAbility.description: Channels updraft energy to slash at a target, knocking them back.

ultimateAbility.name: Pali Storm
ultimateAbility.description: Summons a localized cliff-wind storm dealing heavy area damage.

kauai_002.name: Waimea Drifter
kauai_002.description: Rides the canyon thermals above Waimea Canyon.

primaryAbility.name: Canyon Gust
primaryAbility.description: Sends a focused gust that slows and disorients the target.

ultimateAbility.name: Thermal Tornado
ultimateAbility.description: Creates a swirling vortex that pulls in nearby enemies.

kauai_003.name: Hanalei Skimmer
kauai_003.description: A nimble breed that skims over Hanalei taro fields.

primaryAbility.name: Taro Wind
primaryAbility.description: A quick wind slash that hits all enemies in a line.

ultimateAbility.name: Valley Sweep
ultimateAbility.description: Sweeps across the field dealing damage to all visible enemies.

kauai_004.name: Poʻipū Shoreguard
kauai_004.description: A sturdy ocean breed that patrols Poʻipū beach.

primaryAbility.name: Reef Surge
primaryAbility.description: Launches a surge of reef water at the enemy, slowing them.

ultimateAbility.name: Tidal Fortress
ultimateAbility.description: Raises a tidal barrier that absorbs damage for the team.

kauai_005.name: Kīlauea Reef Dancer
kauai_005.description: Dances through reef currents near the Kīlauea lighthouse.

primaryAbility.name: Lighthouse Spray
primaryAbility.description: A spinning water slash that hits all adjacent foes.

ultimateAbility.name: Reef Vortex
ultimateAbility.description: Opens an oceanic vortex that traps and damages enemies.

kauai_006.name: Nāwiliwili Harbor Diver
kauai_006.description: Masters the deep channels of Nāwiliwili harbor.

primaryAbility.name: Harbor Dive
primaryAbility.description: Dives into water to dodge and strike from below.

ultimateAbility.name: Depth Charge
ultimateAbility.description: Releases a devastating underwater explosion.

kauai_007.name: Kōkeʻe Mountainbird
kauai_007.description: Roams Kōkeʻe State Park's forested highlands.

primaryAbility.name: Forest Stomp
primaryAbility.description: A ground-shaking stomp that stuns nearby enemies.

ultimateAbility.name: Kōkeʻe Earthquake
ultimateAbility.description: Triggers a localized quake dealing heavy ground damage.

kauai_008.name: Līhuʻe Ironfoot
kauai_008.description: A heavy Ground breed native to the Līhuʻe plains.

primaryAbility.name: Iron Kick
primaryAbility.description: A powerful kick that deals heavy physical damage.

ultimateAbility.name: Cane Crush
ultimateAbility.description: Slams with full body weight, shattering armor temporarily.

kauai_009.name: Princeville Grazer
kauai_009.description: A peaceful yet fierce breed from Princeville plateau.

primaryAbility.name: Plateau Rush
primaryAbility.description: Charges forward dealing damage and pushing the target back.

ultimateAbility.name: Bluff Collapse
ultimateAbility.description: Causes the ground to collapse under multiple enemies.

kauai_010.name: Māhāʻulepū Trackrunner
kauai_010.description: Lightning-fast ground runner from eastern Kauaʻi.

primaryAbility.name: Track Sprint
primaryAbility.description: Bursts forward at extreme speed, trampling the first enemy.

ultimateAbility.name: Heritage Blitz
ultimateAbility.description: Sprints through the entire battlefield dealing damage to all.

oahu_001.name: Waikīkī Sunstriker
oahu_001.description: Channels the blazing Honolulu sun into aerial strikes.

primaryAbility.name: Sunstroke Dive
primaryAbility.description: Dives from above with solar energy, burning the target.

ultimateAbility.name: Waikīkī Flare
ultimateAbility.description: Releases a blinding solar burst, stunning all nearby foes.

oahu_002.name: Diamond Head Sentinel
oahu_002.description: Patrols the volcanic crater rim of Diamond Head.
oahu_002.spawnInfo: Diamond Head crater hiking trail summit.

primaryAbility.name: Crater Wind
primaryAbility.description: Channels volcanic wind into a sharp projectile.

ultimateAbility.name: Diamond Gale
ultimateAbility.description: Unleashes a massive volcano-wind storm over a wide area.

oahu_003.name: Mānoa Rainrider
oahu_003.description: Thrives in the perpetual rain of Mānoa Valley.

primaryAbility.name: Rain Slash
primaryAbility.description: Uses rain-infused wings to slice at the target.

ultimateAbility.name: Valley Downpour
ultimateAbility.description: Calls a torrential rain that damages and slows all enemies.

oahu_004.name: Kapolei Dustwalker
oahu_004.description: Tough and durable, bred in the dry western plains of Kapolei.

primaryAbility.name: Dust Slam
primaryAbility.description: Slams the ground creating a blinding dust cloud.

ultimateAbility.name: West Side Quake
ultimateAbility.description: Triggers a powerful ground tremor across the battlefield.

oahu_005.name: Chinatown Scrapper
oahu_005.description: Street-smart and quick, hailing from Honolulu's Chinatown.

primaryAbility.name: Street Jab
primaryAbility.description: A rapid combo of jabs that hits multiple times.

ultimateAbility.name: Market Riot
ultimateAbility.description: Goes into a frenzy striking all nearby enemies rapidly.

oahu_006.name: Kailua Tidecrusher
oahu_006.description: Commands the windward tides of Kailua Bay.

primaryAbility.name: Bay Slam
primaryAbility.description: Crushes the target with a powerful wave from Kailua Bay.

ultimateAbility.name: Windward Tide
ultimateAbility.description: Unleashes a windward tidal surge across all enemies.

oahu_007.name: Pali Rockback
oahu_007.description: A heavily armored breed living on the rocky Nuʻuanu Pali cliffs.

primaryAbility.name: Rock Backfist
primaryAbility.description: Smashes a boulder into the enemy reducing their armor.

ultimateAbility.name: Pali Avalanche
ultimateAbility.description: Sends a rockslide down the cliff hitting all foes.

oahu_008.name: Ewa Flatstriker
oahu_008.description: A fast, flat-land striker from the Ewa Plains.

primaryAbility.name: Flat Dash
primaryAbility.description: Sprints low to the ground and delivers a powerful shoulder check.

ultimateAbility.name: Ewa Bulldoze
ultimateAbility.description: Charges the full length of the field trampling all enemies.

oahu_009.name: Mililani Hillrunner
oahu_009.description: An agile uphill runner bred in Mililani.

primaryAbility.name: Hill Charge
primaryAbility.description: Charges uphill and delivers a gravity-powered headbutt.

ultimateAbility.name: Mauka Surge
ultimateAbility.description: Launches itself off a hillcrest hitting a wide area.

oahu_010.name: Downtown Brawler
oahu_010.description: A legendary street fighter from Downtown Honolulu.

primaryAbility.name: Urban Uppercut
primaryAbility.description: Delivers a devastating uppercut with street-trained power.

ultimateAbility.name: City Block Breaker
ultimateAbility.description: A ground-shattering move that breaks through all defenses.

maui_001.name: Haleakalā Sundiver
maui_001.description: Soars above the world's highest dormant volcano crater.
maui_001.spawnInfo: Haleakalā summit at sunrise — extremely rare.

primaryAbility.name: Summit Strike
primaryAbility.description: Plunges from the summit with crushing aerial force.

ultimateAbility.name: Crater Shockwave
ultimateAbility.description: Releases a volcanic shockwave from above across the arena.

maui_002.name: Kaʻanapali Wingdancer
maui_002.description: Dances through the ocean breezes of Kaʻanapali.

primaryAbility.name: Sunset Slash
primaryAbility.description: Slashes with wind-infused wings at sunset speed.

ultimateAbility.name: Kaʻanapali Gale
ultimateAbility.description: Creates a resort-wide gale that pushes back all enemies.

maui_003.name: Pāʻia Tradewind
maui_003.description: A fast breed riding Maui's famous trade winds.

primaryAbility.name: Trade Slash
primaryAbility.description: Rides a trade wind gust to slash enemies at high speed.

ultimateAbility.name: Hookipa Blast
ultimateAbility.description: Channels legendary Ho'okipa winds into a powerful wave.

maui_004.name: Lahaina Tideguard
maui_004.description: Defends the historic Lahaina harbor and reef.
maui_004.spawnInfo: Lahaina Harbor and Front Street reef.

primaryAbility.name: Harbor Shield
primaryAbility.description: Creates a water barrier that absorbs incoming damage.

ultimateAbility.name: Lahaina Tsunami
ultimateAbility.description: A mighty tidal surge that sweeps all enemies off their feet.

maui_005.name: Māʻalaea Reefstrider
maui_005.description: Strides through the Māʻalaea reef at incredible speed.

primaryAbility.name: Reef Sprint
primaryAbility.description: Sprints through water dealing damage in a straight line.

ultimateAbility.name: Reef Obliterator
ultimateAbility.description: Charges at full speed demolishing reef and enemy alike.

maui_006.name: Upcountry Trailblazer
maui_006.description: Blazes through Maui upcountry farms and ranches.

primaryAbility.name: Ranch Charge
primaryAbility.description: A powerful ranch-style charge that deals heavy impact damage.

ultimateAbility.name: Paniolo Stampede
ultimateAbility.description: Stampedes through the battlefield trampling all in its path.

maui_007.name: Wailuku Stoneback
maui_007.description: Tank-like breed from the lava rock fields of Wailuku.

primaryAbility.name: Lava Stomp
primaryAbility.description: Slams the ground with lava-heated feet, burning enemies.

ultimateAbility.name: Iao Landslide
ultimateAbility.description: Triggers a valley landslide burying all enemies in rubble.

maui_008.name: Kīhei Sandslicer
maui_008.description: A quick coastal ground breed from Kīhei.

primaryAbility.name: Sand Slash
primaryAbility.description: Kicks up sand and slashes enemies, reducing their accuracy.

ultimateAbility.name: South Maui Sandstorm
ultimateAbility.description: Creates a sandstorm that damages and blinds all enemies.

maui_009.name: Kaupō Trailcrusher
maui_009.description: A rare heavyweight from the remote Kaupō trail.

primaryAbility.name: Remote Slam
primaryAbility.description: An earth-shaking slam powered by isolation and raw strength.

ultimateAbility.name: Gap Crusher
ultimateAbility.description: Cracks the ground sending shockwaves in all directions.

maui_010.name: Hāna Rainforest Stalker
maui_010.description: Stalks quietly through the dense Hāna rainforest.
maui_010.spawnInfo: Road to Hāna jungle — rare encounter.

primaryAbility.name: Jungle Ambush
primaryAbility.description: Leaps from cover dealing a surprise ambush strike.

ultimateAbility.name: Hāna Overgrowth
ultimateAbility.description: Summons entangling jungle vines to immobilize all enemies.

molokai_001.name: Kalaupapa Cliffdiver
molokai_001.description: Fearlessly dives the world's tallest sea cliffs at Kalaupapa.

primaryAbility.name: Pali Plunge
primaryAbility.description: Dives off the sea cliffs for a devastating dive attack.

ultimateAbility.name: Kalaupapa Dive Bomb
ultimateAbility.description: An aerial bomb drop from maximum height.

molokai_002.name: Halawa Valleybird
molokai_002.description: Soars above the ancient taro farms of Halawa Valley.

primaryAbility.name: Valley Updraft
primaryAbility.description: Catches a valley updraft for a rapid strike.

ultimateAbility.name: Ancient Wind
ultimateAbility.description: Calls upon ancient valley winds to scatter all enemies.

molokai_003.name: Moʻomomi Beachflier
molokai_003.description: Skims above the pristine Moʻomomi dunes.

primaryAbility.name: Dune Skim
primaryAbility.description: Skims low and fast dealing a quick dust-and-wing slash.

ultimateAbility.name: Dune Storm
ultimateAbility.description: Kicks up a massive dune storm blinding and damaging enemies.

molokai_004.name: Pāpōhaku Shorewatcher
molokai_004.description: Guards the longest white-sand beach in Hawaiʻi.

primaryAbility.name: Shore Surge
primaryAbility.description: Sends a powerful shore wave crashing into the enemy.

ultimateAbility.name: Long Beach Deluge
ultimateAbility.description: Floods the entire battlefield with ocean water.

molokai_005.name: East Molokaʻi Reefhunter
molokai_005.description: Hunts through the reef ecosystem of east Molokaʻi.

primaryAbility.name: Reef Hunt
primaryAbility.description: Stalks and strikes from the reef with pinpoint accuracy.

ultimateAbility.name: Reef Ambush
ultimateAbility.description: Erupts from underwater striking all surface targets.

molokai_006.name: Kaunakakai Dockthumper
molokai_006.description: A stocky brawler from Kaunakakai harbor.

primaryAbility.name: Dock Thump
primaryAbility.description: Thumps the dock planks causing shockwaves underfoot.

ultimateAbility.name: Wharf Demolisher
ultimateAbility.description: Tears up the dock and hurls debris at all enemies.

molokai_007.name: Maunaloa Plateau Stomper
molokai_007.description: A heavy stomper from the Maunaloa plateau in western Molokaʻi.

primaryAbility.name: Plateau Pound
primaryAbility.description: Pounds the plateau floor with seismic force.

ultimateAbility.name: Maunaloa Tremor
ultimateAbility.description: Causes a deep tremor that shakes the entire arena.

molokai_008.name: Central Molokaʻi Fieldrunner
molokai_008.description: Runs freely across the agricultural central plains.

primaryAbility.name: Field Charge
primaryAbility.description: Charges across the open field at high speed.

ultimateAbility.name: Harvest Rush
ultimateAbility.description: Stampedes through the battlefield like a harvester.

primaryAbility.name: North Shore Slam
primaryAbility.description: A raw powerful slam from north-shore tough conditioning.

ultimateAbility.name: Northpoint Eruption
ultimateAbility.description: A volcanic ground eruption from the north point cliffs.

molokai_010.name: Fishpond Mudwrestler
molokai_010.description: Battles in the legendary Hawaiian fishponds.
molokai_010.spawnInfo: Ancient Hawaiian fishponds — east coast Molokaʻi.

primaryAbility.name: Mud Slam
primaryAbility.description: Hurls a ball of fishpond mud that slows and debuffs enemies.

ultimateAbility.name: Fishpond Flood
ultimateAbility.description: Floods the arena with fishpond water trapping all enemies.

lanai_001.name: Lānaʻi City Hilltop Glider
lanai_001.description: Glides above the ironwood-covered hills of Lānaʻi City.

primaryAbility.name: Ironwood Gust
primaryAbility.description: A gust filtered through ironwood trees that pierces armor.

ultimateAbility.name: Pine Squall
ultimateAbility.description: Launches ironwood pine needles as projectiles at all enemies.

lanai_002.name: Munro Trail Windcutter
lanai_002.description: Cuts through mist and wind on the Munro Trail ridge.

primaryAbility.name: Ridge Slash
primaryAbility.description: A ridge-wind slash that covers a wide arc.

ultimateAbility.name: Munro Maelstrom
ultimateAbility.description: Creates a ridge maelstrom that damages everyone around it.

lanai_003.name: Shipwreck Beach Screamer
lanai_003.description: Screams through the windy Shipwreck Beach channel.

primaryAbility.name: Channel Scream
primaryAbility.description: A sonic wind attack that disorients the target.

ultimateAbility.name: Shipwreck Gale
ultimateAbility.description: A ferocious channel gale that knocks back all enemies.

lanai_004.name: Hulopoʻe Bay Waveguard
lanai_004.description: Guards the pristine snorkeling bay at Hulopoʻe.

primaryAbility.name: Bay Guard
primaryAbility.description: Deflects incoming attacks with a bay water shield.

ultimateAbility.name: Spinner Surge
ultimateAbility.description: Summons spinner dolphins to bombard all enemies.

lanai_005.name: Pōʻaiwa Reefstreak
lanai_005.description: Streaks through the Pōʻaiwa reef at blinding speed.

primaryAbility.name: Reef Streak
primaryAbility.description: Dashes through the reef dealing slicing damage.

ultimateAbility.name: Reef Storm
ultimateAbility.description: Launches a reef-sourced current that shreds enemies.

lanai_006.name: Garden of the Gods Stonekeeper
lanai_006.description: Ancient keeper of the mysterious rock formations.
lanai_006.spawnInfo: Keāhiakawelo (Garden of the Gods) — very rare.

primaryAbility.name: God Stone Toss
primaryAbility.description: Hurls a sacred rock dealing heavy physical damage.

ultimateAbility.name: Divine Rockfall
ultimateAbility.description: Calls a divine rockfall crushing all enemies on the field.

lanai_007.name: Lānaʻi City Pineapple Stomper
lanai_007.description: A sturdy worker breed from the old pineapple plantation.

primaryAbility.name: Plantation Stomp
primaryAbility.description: Stomps with agricultural power dealing heavy damage.

ultimateAbility.name: Pineapple Crush
ultimateAbility.description: Crushes enemies under the weight of plantation tradition.

lanai_008.name: Kaumālāpau Harbor Lifter
lanai_008.description: A powerful loader breed from the main harbor.

primaryAbility.name: Harbor Lift
primaryAbility.description: Lifts and slams the enemy with freight-handling strength.

ultimateAbility.name: Cargo Drop
ultimateAbility.description: Drops a massive virtual cargo container on the battlefield.

lanai_009.name: Mānele Bay Bluffcharger
lanai_009.description: Charges down the bluffs above Mānele Bay.

primaryAbility.name: Bluff Charge
primaryAbility.description: Charges down the steep bluff with full momentum.

ultimateAbility.name: Bay Blitzkrieg
ultimateAbility.description: A full-momentum downhill charge that flattens all enemies.

lanai_010.name: Lānaʻi Highlands Trapper
lanai_010.description: Sets traps in the wooded highlands of Lānaʻi.

primaryAbility.name: Trap Spring
primaryAbility.description: Springs a concealed trap on the unsuspecting target.

ultimateAbility.name: Highland Snare
ultimateAbility.description: Spreads multiple snares, immobilizing all enemies briefly.

hawaii_001.name: Kīlauea Lavastrider
hawaii_001.description: Walks across active lava flows, untouched by flame.
hawaii_001.spawnInfo: Kīlauea caldera rim — very rare eruption events.

primaryAbility.name: Lava Step
primaryAbility.description: Stamps a foot leaving a burning lava patch that damages enemies.

ultimateAbility.name: Eruption Walk
ultimateAbility.description: Triggers a full caldera eruption that devastates the battlefield.

hawaii_002.name: Mauna Kea Summit Keeper
hawaii_002.description: Endures the sub-zero summit of Mauna Kea.

primaryAbility.name: Ice Pack Slam
primaryAbility.description: Slams with an icy fist formed from summit frost.

ultimateAbility.name: Summit Blizzard
ultimateAbility.description: Unleashes a blizzard from Mauna Kea's summit over all foes.

hawaii_003.name: Waipiʻo Valley Charger
hawaii_003.description: Charges through the waterfall-rich Waipiʻo Valley.

primaryAbility.name: Valley Watercharge
primaryAbility.description: Charges infused with valley waterfall energy.

ultimateAbility.name: Waipiʻo Flood
ultimateAbility.description: Channels all valley waterfalls into a devastating torrent.

hawaii_004.name: Hilo Rainstomper
hawaii_004.description: Toughened by the constant rain of Hilo.

primaryAbility.name: Rain Stomp
primaryAbility.description: Stomps the wet ground splashing all nearby enemies.

ultimateAbility.name: Hilo Downpour Slam
ultimateAbility.description: Combines Hilo rainfall with ground force for massive impact.

hawaii_005.name: Kona Coffee Duster
hawaii_005.description: A tireless worker breed from Kona coffee farms.

primaryAbility.name: Coffee Kick
primaryAbility.description: A caffeinated kick that temporarily increases the user's speed.

ultimateAbility.name: Kona Burst
ultimateAbility.description: Releases a full-energy caffeine burst hitting all enemies.

hawaii_006.name: Puna Lava Tube Dweller
hawaii_006.description: Lives in the vast lava tube networks of Puna.

primaryAbility.name: Tube Slam
primaryAbility.description: Slams a foe into the ground as if pushing them into a tube.

ultimateAbility.name: Lava Tube Collapse
ultimateAbility.description: Collapses an underground tube sending shockwaves everywhere.

primaryAbility.name: Mountain Ramble
primaryAbility.description: A wide sweeping attack like a rambling mountain creature.

ultimateAbility.name: Kohala Stampede
ultimateAbility.description: Stampedes the full width of the field.

hawaii_008.name: Kaʻū Desert Wanderer
hawaii_008.description: Survives in the barren Kāʻū desert.

primaryAbility.name: Desert Blast
primaryAbility.description: A hot desert wind blast that scorches the enemy.

ultimateAbility.name: Kāʻū Desolation
ultimateAbility.description: Scorches the entire battlefield with desert heat.

hawaii_009.name: Mauna Loa Ridge Hawk
hawaii_009.description: An aerial predator circling the Mauna Loa ridgeline.
hawaii_009.spawnInfo: Mauna Loa trail — high altitude zones.

primaryAbility.name: Ridgeline Dive
primaryAbility.description: A hawk-like dive attack along the volcanic ridge.

ultimateAbility.name: Mauna Loa Thermal
ultimateAbility.description: Rides a volcanic thermal to unleash a high-altitude air strike.

hawaii_010.name: Kealakekua Bay Sharkwhisper
hawaii_010.description: Commands the sharks of Kealakekua Bay.

primaryAbility.name: Shark Call
primaryAbility.description: Calls a shark to assist in a coordinated attack.

ultimateAbility.name: Bay Frenzy
ultimateAbility.description: Triggers a shark frenzy that assaults all enemies repeatedly.
